title: clinopodium neogaeum
intro: Clinopodium neogaeum, also known as mountain savory, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Clinopodium neogaeum include relief from digestive issues, colds, and flu, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of mountain savory typically involve infusing the leaves in hot water to make a tea, or using the plant's essential oils in aromatherapy.
